title: Vertex acquires Crinetics Pharmaceuticals for $10 billion as biotech M&A booms
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals has agreed to acquire Crinetics Pharmaceuticals in a $10 billion deal, signaling continued momentum in the biotech M&A market. The acquisition reflects Vertex's strategy to expand its pipeline and capitalize on strong investor appetite for transformative biotech transactions.

title: I spoke to Anthropic's CEO about how AI may affect biotech. Here's what I learned
summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei discusses the role of artificial intelligence in biotech and drug discovery. While some claims about AI may be hype, Amodei suggests AI could still make an immediate practical impact on the biotech field by accelerating research and development processes.

title: Online GLP-1 prescriptions are often fast, easy — and low on clinical oversight
summary: A Yale-led study published in JAMA finds that online prescriptions for GLP-1 weight-loss and diabetes drugs are frequently completed with minimal clinical oversight. The secret-shopper study raises concerns about patient safety given the growing demand for telehealth-deliveredGLP-1 medications.
